name: selftune-sync
message: Run selftune sync to replay and ingest new Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and OpenClaw source data, then rebuild the repaired skill-usage overlay.

name: selftune-status
message: Run selftune sync first, then run selftune status --json and report any skills with pass rate below 80% or still ungraded due to sparse recent checks.
description: Daily health check after source sync

name: selftune-evolve
message: Run selftune sync, review source-truth status, and evolve any skills with enough negative evidence or clear undertriggering patterns. Report proposed changes and validation results.

name: selftune-watch
message: Run selftune sync first, then run selftune watch on all recently evolved skills to detect regressions against the latest source-truth telemetry.
description: Monitor regressions every 6 hours after source sync
